title: Ottoman Empire is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Ottoman Empire, historically also known as the Turkish Empire, was a state that spanned much of Southeast Europe, West Asia, and North Africa from the 14th century to the early 20th century, centered in modern-day Turkey.

title: Soviet Union is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Union of Soviet Socialist Republics (USSR), also known as the Soviet Union, was a transcontinental country that spanned much of Eurasia from 1922 until its dissolution in 1991.

title: Roman Empire is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Roman Empire was a state that controlled the Mediterranean and much of Western Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa during the classical period.

title: Nazi Germany is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: Nazi Germany, officially the German Reich and later the Greater German Reich, was the German state between 1933 and 1945, when Adolf Hitler and the Nazi Party controlled the country, transforming it into a totalitarian dictatorship.

title: Achaemenid Empire is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Achaemenid Empire was an ancient Iranian empire founded by Cyrus the Great of the Achaemenid dynasty in 550 BC.

title: Pahlavi dynasty begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Pahlavi dynasty is an Iranian royal dynasty that was the last to rule Iran before the country's monarchy was overthrown by the Iranian Revolution in 1979.
Sverige blir medlem i Europeiska unionen.
subtitle: Svensk samtidshistoria
title: Sverige går med i EU
Holy Roman Empire is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Holy Roman Empire, also known as the Holy Roman Empire of the German Nation after 1512, was a polity comprising and controlling much of Central and Western Europe, headed by the Holy Roman Emperor and characterized by a decentralized political structure.

title: Byzantine Empire is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Byzantine Empire, also known as the Eastern Roman Empire, was the continuation of the Roman Empire centred on Constantinople during late antiquity and the Middle Ages.

title: British Empire is established
subtitle: Colonial empire
fact: The British Empire comprised the dominions, colonies, protectorates, mandates, and other territories headed by the British monarchy.

title: Sasanian Empire is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Sasanian Empire, officially Eranshahr, was an Iranian empire that was founded and ruled by the House of Sasan from 224 to 651 AD.

title: Yugoslavia is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: Yugoslavia was a country in Central Europe and the Balkans that existed from 1918 to 1992.
